text: Package managers automate dependency installation, version management, and script execution. npm (Node Package Manager) is the default for Node.js with 2M+ packages. Yarn (Facebook, 2016) added deterministic installs via lockfiles. pnpm (2017) saves disk space via content-addressable storage (symlinked node_modules).
`^1.2.3` allows minor/patch updates; `~1.2.3` allows patch only.
